## Problem Statement

> What problem are you trying to solve? What is the current pain point?

---

## Proposed Solution

> Describe the feature or change you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

---

## Alternatives Considered

> Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why did you rule them out?

---

## User Story

> (Optional) As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

---

## Additional Context

> Mockups, diagrams, links, or any other context that helps explain the request.
